Package neqsim.process.safety.depressurization

Class STS0131AcceptanceCriteria

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.safety.depressurization.STS0131AcceptanceCriteria
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class STS0131AcceptanceCriteria extends Object implements Serializable
Acceptance criteria for STS0131-style fire escalation screening of blowdown results.

The criteria are evaluated against the time series produced by DepressurizationSimulator.DepressurizationResult. The class is intentionally simple: project-specific rupture calculations, fire loads, and escape analyses provide the acceptance thresholds; this class performs a traceable comparison of pressure, remaining mass, and peak discharge rate at the limiting time.

Version:
1.0
Author:
NeqSim Development Team
See Also:

  • Method Details

    • setTimeToEscapeS

      public STS0131AcceptanceCriteria setTimeToEscapeS(double timeToEscapeS)
      Sets the personnel escape time used as one possible limiting time.
      Parameters:
      timeToEscapeS - time to escape in s; use a positive finite value
      Returns:
      this criteria object for chaining

    • setEstimatedTimeToRuptureS

      public STS0131AcceptanceCriteria setEstimatedTimeToRuptureS(double estimatedTimeToRuptureS)
      Sets the estimated time to rupture for the fire-exposed item.
      Parameters:
      estimatedTimeToRuptureS - estimated time to rupture in s; use a positive finite value
      Returns:
      this criteria object for chaining

    • setMaximumPressureAtRuptureBara

      public STS0131AcceptanceCriteria setMaximumPressureAtRuptureBara(double maximumPressureAtRuptureBara)
      Sets the maximum acceptable pressure at the limiting time.
      Parameters:
      maximumPressureAtRuptureBara - maximum pressure in bara
      Returns:
      this criteria object for chaining

    • setMaximumRemainingMassKg

      public STS0131AcceptanceCriteria setMaximumRemainingMassKg(double maximumRemainingMassKg)
      Sets the maximum acceptable remaining inventory at the limiting time.
      Parameters:
      maximumRemainingMassKg - maximum remaining inventory in kg
      Returns:
      this criteria object for chaining

    • setMaximumEscalatedFireRateKgPerS

      public STS0131AcceptanceCriteria setMaximumEscalatedFireRateKgPerS(double maximumEscalatedFireRateKgPerS)
      Sets the maximum acceptable escalated fire rate represented by the discharge rate.
      Parameters:
      maximumEscalatedFireRateKgPerS - maximum discharge or escalated fire rate in kg/s
      Returns:
      this criteria object for chaining

    • getTimeToEscapeS

      public double getTimeToEscapeS()
      Gets the configured personnel escape time.
      Returns:
      escape time in s, or NaN when not configured

    • getEstimatedTimeToRuptureS

      public double getEstimatedTimeToRuptureS()
      Gets the configured estimated time to rupture.
      Returns:
      estimated time to rupture in s, or NaN when not configured

      public double getMaximumPressureAtRuptureBara()
      Gets the configured maximum pressure at the limiting time.
      Returns:
      maximum pressure in bara, or NaN when not configured

      public double getMaximumRemainingMassKg()
      Gets the configured maximum remaining mass.
      Returns:
      maximum remaining mass in kg, or NaN when not configured

      public double getMaximumEscalatedFireRateKgPerS()
      Gets the configured maximum escalated fire rate.
      Returns:
      maximum escalated fire rate in kg/s, or NaN when not configured

    • evaluate

      public STS0131AcceptanceResult evaluate(DepressurizationSimulator.DepressurizationResult result)
      Evaluates criteria against a depressurization result.
      Parameters:
      result - depressurization time-series result
      Returns:
      STS0131 acceptance result
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if result is null or has no time samples

    • getLimitingTime

      private double getLimitingTime(DepressurizationSimulator.DepressurizationResult result)
      Gets the earliest configured limiting time bounded by the result duration.
      Parameters:
      result - depressurization result
      Returns:
      limiting time in s

    • interpolate

      private double interpolate(List<Double> time, List<Double> values, double targetTime)
      Interpolates a time-series value.
      Parameters:
      time - time vector in s
      values - value vector
      targetTime - target time in s
      Returns:
      interpolated value, or the nearest endpoint value outside the vector range

    • maxUpToTime

      private double maxUpToTime(DepressurizationSimulator.DepressurizationResult result, double limitingTime)
      Finds the maximum discharge rate up to the limiting time.
      Parameters:
      result - depressurization result
      limitingTime - limiting time in s
      Returns:
      maximum discharge rate in kg/s
